programs.title: Good Bones
programs.desc: Mina and Karen take on a fire-damaged home, but they realise the only way to fix it is to demolish the house and start from scratch.

programs.title: Sin City Rehab
programs.desc: With a budget over $1 million, Alison takes on her biggest renovation yet with an Amalfi meets Palm Springs inspired theme.

programs.title: Building Roots
programs.desc: Ben and Cristi help two siblings transform a dated legacy home into a modern mountain lodge suited for their large family gatherings.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: An interior designer wants to buy her next house in Phoenix, and her colleague is along to keep her spending and design goals within reason.

programs.title: Flip Or Flop
programs.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home in Long Beach, California that sounds like the kind of project that has become their standard.

programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.desc: A Vermont mum moves her son to the Dominican Republic to learn about the other half of his family history.
